action.content:
The product is a new type of paper that can be used to wrap food, and is edible.

Product Description 1: 
Introducing EdiWrap - the revolutionary, edible paper that's changing the way we think about food packaging. Made from a unique blend of natural ingredients, EdiWrap is not only biodegradable but also safe for consumption. Perfect for food trucks, cafes, and restaurants, EdiWrap reduces waste and adds a touch of creativity to your meal presentation. Simply wrap your favorite dish in EdiWrap and serve - no need for separate plates or utensils.

Product Description 2: 
Imagine a world where food waste is a thing of the past, and mealtime is a sensory experience. That's what we've created with our innovative edible paper, TasteWrap. Made from a proprietary blend of plant-based materials, TasteWrap is not only compostable but also bursting with flavor. Use it to wrap sushi, tacos, or any other dish that deserves a pop of color and a hint of sweetness. With TasteWrap, the packaging becomes part of the meal, and the possibilities are endless.
action.label: response
